sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102207" key="ta/kwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τάκων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, a kind of <sense id="n102207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sausage</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rissole</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
